title: The group table should have an option to modify font size
excerpt:

posts.author: iras (Ira Segal)
posts.cookedHtml:
Users should be able to choose Font size at the group/table out of at least three sizes: Small (Same as now), Medium, and Large.
The main benefit will be to be able to see the table widget at a larger scale without having to use the browser’s zoom-in options as it deforms the dashboard when it is presented.
